claim: real WebAssembly plugin lifecycle has an adjacent validation path

evidenceCommands.proves: Rust source can build a WASI Preview 1 WebAssembly component artifact.
Browser host can load the transpiled component and exercise setup, ingest, metadata, and teardown.
JCO is available and the compiled hello-world plugin binary is recognized when present.

promotionBoundary.canSay: The extension sandbox policy POC is linked to a real WASM validation path.
promotionBoundary.cannotSay: The synthetic sandbox report itself executed real WASM plugins in production governance.

nextPromotion: Run the dedicated E2E command in the target environment and attach its output before claiming real execution in proposal text.
